scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --outDir dist/assets --module ES2020 --target ES2020 && cp index.html dist/index.html && mkdir -p dist/src/styles && cp src/styles/*.css dist/src/styles/ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/index.html'; let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); s=s.replace('/src/main.ts', '/assets/main.js'); fs.writeFileSync(p,s);"
scripts.test:api: sh -c 'OUT=$(mktemp -d /tmp/ajentic-ui-api-behavior-XXXXXX) && export OUT && CONFIG="$OUT/tsconfig.api.json" && export CONFIG && trap "rm -rf \"$OUT\"" EXIT && node -e "require(\"fs\").writeFileSync(process.env.CONFIG, JSON.stringify({compilerOptions:{target:\"ES2020\",module:\"commonjs\",strict:true,esModuleInterop:true,skipLibCheck:true,rootDir:process.cwd()+\"/src\",outDir:process.env.OUT},files:[process.cwd()+\"/src/api/runBehaviorTests.ts\"]}))" && tsc -p "$CONFIG" && node "$OUT/api/runBehaviorTests.js"'
scripts.dev: node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),cp=require('child_process'); fs.rmSync('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev',{recursive:true,force:true}); cp.execFileSync(process.platform==='win32'?'npx.cmd':'npx',['tsc','--outDir','/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev/assets','--module','ES2020','--target','ES2020'],{stdio:'inherit'}); fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev/src/styles',{recursive:true}); for(const f of fs.readdirSync('src/styles')) fs.copyFileSync(path.join('src/styles',f), path.join('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev/src/styles',f)); let html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8').replace('/src/main.ts','/assets/main.js'); fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev/index.html',html); const types={'.html':'text/html','.js':'text/javascript','.css':'text/css'}; http.createServer((req,res)=>{const url=req.url==='/'?'/index.html':req.url.split('?')[0]; const file=path.normalize(path.join('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev',url)); if(!file.startsWith('/tmp/ajentic-ui-dev')){res.writeHead(403);res.end();return;} fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end('not found');return;} res.writeHead(200,{'content-type':types[path.extname(file)]||'text/plain'}); res.end(data);});}).listen(5173,'127.0.0.1',()=>console.log('AJENTIC local operator shell dev server: http://127.0.0.1:5173'));"
